name: bug-fixer
description: When user says 'this feature is broken', 'error', 'something is wrong', or reports a bug/compile error/runtime exception
intent: Diagnose root cause through systematic troubleshooting conversation, then apply targeted fixes — Forge's structured debugging loop
author: ReqForge

when: User reports a bug or error
Code review stage 2 found quality issues
